landing.hero_subtitle: An 8-factor, regime-aware strategy with walk-forward validation across {years} years. Designed for patient, long-term capital seeking systematic alpha with institutional-grade risk management.
landing.equity_chart_subtitle: Walk-forward out-of-sample results vs NIFTY 50 buy-and-hold. Normalised to 100 at inception.
landing.deep_dive_subtitle: Detailed analytics dashboard with per-window breakdowns, drawdown analysis, and regime performance.

process_steps.title: Factor-Based Stock Selection
process_steps.description: 8 quantitative factors spanning momentum, value, quality, and low volatility. Cross-sectional ranking of NIFTY LargeMidcap 250 constituents. Top 20 positions with 15% max single-stock weight, rebalanced daily across 21 staggered tranches.

process_steps.title: Regime-Aware Allocation
process_steps.description: Multi-signal ensemble detects market regimes on a continuous scale. Dynamically allocates between equities and gold based on conviction.

process_steps.title: Walk-Forward Validation
process_steps.description: {windows} non-overlapping out-of-sample windows. 2-year training, 6-month testing, rolled forward sequentially. Survivorship-bias-free using 96 NSE constituent snapshots.

landing.cta_headline:
For Qualified Investors Seeking Systematic,
Research-Driven Portfolio Management
landing.cta_body: Minimum investment ₹50 Lakhs. Available to accredited investors who understand and accept the risks of systematic equity strategies.

approach.page_subtitle: A systematic, rules-based investment process combining factor-based stock selection, regime-aware allocation, and rigorous out-of-sample validation.
philosophy_paragraphs: We believe that markets reward certain persistent risk premia — momentum, value, quality, and low volatility — that can be harvested systematically. Rather than relying on human judgement or conviction-based stock picking, we use a quantitative model that ranks stocks on 8 measurable factors and constructs portfolios purely based on data.

Equally important is knowing when to invest. Our regime detection ensemble continuously monitors market conditions and adjusts the portfolio's allocation between equities and gold. This reduces drawdowns without sacrificing long-term returns.

Every aspect of our methodology is walk-forward validated — we never use future data to make past decisions. This discipline ensures that our track record reflects what an investor would have actually experienced, not an optimised backtest.
approach.factor_section_subtitle: Stocks from the NIFTY LargeMidcap 250 universe are ranked across four factor categories. Top 20 stocks by composite score are selected with a 15% max single-stock weight cap, rebalanced daily across 21 staggered tranches.

factor_categories.name: Momentum
factor_categories.description: Multiple timeframe price and earnings momentum signals

factor_categories.name: Quality
factor_categories.description: Profitability, capital efficiency, and balance sheet strength

approach.regime_subtitle: A multi-signal ensemble detects market regimes on a continuous scale. The allocation between equities and gold shifts dynamically based on regime conviction.
approach.allocation_chart_subtitle: Dynamic allocation across equities and gold based on regime confidence score. Each bar represents a rebalance cycle (21 daily staggered tranches per cycle).
approach.wf_section_subtitle: The strongest test of any investment strategy is whether it works on data it has never seen. We use walk-forward validation — the gold standard in systematic trading research.
approach.wf_description: How it works: In each window, the model optimises factor weights on the training data (2 years), then applies those weights to the subsequent test period (6 months) that it has never seen. Within each test window, the portfolio is rebalanced daily via 21 staggered tranches with a 15% maximum single-stock weight cap, reducing timing risk and market impact. The portfolio track record is built entirely from these test periods — none of the reported returns come from in-sample data.
approach.wf_survivorship: Survivorship bias elimination: At each point in time, the stock universe is reconstructed from official NSE constituent PDFs. We maintain 96 point-in-time snapshots covering 338 unique stocks, ensuring that only stocks that were actually in the index at that time are considered.

performance.page_subtitle: Walk-forward out-of-sample results from {period_start} to {period_end}. All returns include 10 bps round-trip slippage.
performance.methodology_note: All results are out-of-sample, walk-forward validated across {windows} non-overlapping windows. No in-sample optimization of parameters. Staggered daily rebalancing (21 tranches) with 15% max single-stock weight cap. Survivorship-bias-free constituent data from 96 NSE official monthly snapshots covering 338 unique stocks. 10 bps round-trip slippage applied to all trades. Strategy execution assumes next-day open prices with one-period signal lag. {trades:,} total trades across {years} years.

about.page_subtitle: Quantitative research meets disciplined portfolio management. Built on data, validated by rigour.
firm_description: EFP Wealth is a quantitative portfolio management firm focused on Indian equities. We apply systematic, factor-based strategies to construct concentrated portfolios that aim to deliver superior risk-adjusted returns over market cycles.

Our edge is not a secret formula — it is process. Every decision in our investment pipeline is rules-based, testable, and reproducible. We publish our methodology transparently because we believe that honest performance speaks louder than marketing narratives.
We serve a select group of qualified investors who value rigorous research, transparent reporting, and a long-term orientation over short-term performance chasing.

principles.title: Data Over Narrative
principles.description: Investment decisions are driven by quantitative signals, not market commentary or gut feelings. Every position has a measurable rationale.

principles.title: Honest Validation
principles.description: We test strategies on data they have never seen. Walk-forward validation prevents overfitting and ensures the track record is genuine.

principles.title: Risk Before Return
principles.description: Regime-aware allocation prioritises capital preservation. We would rather underperform in euphoria than suffer catastrophic loss in a crisis.

principles.title: Radical Transparency
principles.description: Our methodology, factors, signals, and validation process are fully disclosed. Investors know exactly how their capital is managed.

disclaimers.banner_text: All returns shown are BACKTESTED, HYPOTHETICAL results using historical data. They do NOT represent actual trading. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Investments are subject to market risks. This is not investment advice.
disclaimers.sticky_text: Backtested, hypothetical results. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Not investment advice.
disclaimers.footer_text: IMPORTANT DISCLOSURES: All returns shown are based on walk-forward backtested results using historical data and are HYPOTHETICAL. They do not represent actual trading and were derived with the benefit of hindsight. Past performance does not guarantee future results and is not indicative of future returns. Backtested performance has inherent limitations: (1) it is designed with the benefit of hindsight, (2) it does not reflect the impact of economic and market factors differently than during the backtested period, (3) it cannot fully account for the impact of financial risk in actual trading, (4) actual results may differ due to market conditions, liquidity, and execution differences. Walk-forward validation mitigates overfitting but does not eliminate it. 10 bps round-trip slippage applied. Does not include management fees, taxes, stamp duty, STT, or impact costs beyond slippage. Strategy results assume full investment at model signals; actual investor returns may differ. Investments in securities are subject to market risks. Read all related documents carefully before investing.
disclaimers.methodology_disclosure: Walk-forward backtested performance using 17 non-overlapping 6-month out-of-sample windows from 2016-2026. Factor weights optimised on 2-year training windows. Survivorship-bias-corrected using 96 point-in-time NSE constituent snapshots covering 464 unique stocks. Constituent data may have gaps of up to 6 months in recent periods.
disclaimers.bias_disclosures: Potential biases: (1) Survivorship bias — mitigated via point-in-time constituent data (96 snapshots); 46 of 464 historical constituents have incomplete data (6.1% of constituent-months). (2) Look-ahead bias — mitigated via walk-forward validation (no future data in training). (3) Data-snooping bias — 8 weight presets tested per window; risk of overfitting partially addressed by out-of-sample validation. (4) Transaction cost bias — 10 bps round-trip slippage applied; actual costs may differ. (5) Selection bias — NIFTY LargeMidcap 250 universe selected ex-ante, not cherry-picked.
